title: Centre appoints Justice Sudhir Kumar Jain as DRAT Delhi chairperson
description: The Central government has appointed former Delhi High Court Justice Sudhir Kumar Jain as the chairperson of the Debts Recovery Appellate Tribunal (DRAT) at Delhi.The appointment is for a term of five years or until he attains the age of 70 years, whichever is earlier. The appointment was communicated by the Finance Ministry's Department of Financial Services through a letter dated April 1.Justice Jain is currently serving as a Member of the National Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (NCDRC
